full_text:
A) Dissociation

The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H) by Maria and Foteini.

Dispase dissociation media included 19,4 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 400 µl Dispase + 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 17,8 ml DMEM/F12+++, 2 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

(1) First RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 20 ml DMEM/F12+++. (1) Second RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min+ 20 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 30 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: (1) First RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 20 ml DMEM/F12+++. (1) Second RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min+ 20 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 35 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Cell counts:

B) Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 10E6 cells/vial total 10 vials

Sequentially dissociated cells: 10E6 cells/vial total 7 vials

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 7.39 | 7.65
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 3.11 | 4.10
 | viability [%] | 42.1 | 53.5
 | size [µm] | 7.8 | 9.3
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 7.74 | 8.0
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 2.79 | 4.19
 | viability [%] | 35.8 | 52.4
 | size [µm] | 8.0 | 9.1
Average | total [E6 cells/ml] | 15.18 | 7.825
total | total [E6 cells] | 455.4 in 30 ml | 273.9 in 35 ml
Average | live [E6 cells/ml] | 5.9 | 4.145
total | live [E6 cells] | 177 in 30 ml | 145.075 in 35 ml
 | viability [%] | 38.95 | 52.95
